images.agreement.description:
Use Cloudflare Images to store, resize and deliver images affordably.

**Resizing: Free**
You can create up to 20 variants.

**Storage:  per 100,000 images (prepaid)**
You only pay for the original image. If you have 10 original images with 5 configured variants, only the 10 original images count towards your storage limit.

**Delivery:  per 100,000 images served (postpaid)**
You will only be billed for number of images served.
images.current_usage.images_stream_bundl: You are currently subscribed to the Starter Bundle which includes 100,000 images (as well as 1,000 minutes of video with Cloudflare Stream).

You are currently subscribed to the Creator Bundle.

images.billing.bundle_modal_selection_de: You can purchase Cloudflare Images on its own or bundle it with Cloudflare Stream.
images.billing.bundle_page_selection_des: Use Cloudflare Images to store, optimize, and deliver your images. Purchase Cloudflare Images on its own or bundle it with Cloudflare Stream.
images.billing.bundle_page_existing_subs:
Use Cloudflare Images to store, optimize, and deliver your images.
**You have an existing subscription to Cloudflare Stream. You can purchase Starter or Creator bundles only when your Cloudflare Stream subscription is canceled and has ended.**
images.billing.bundle_cloudflare_images_: Store, resize, optimize and serve images at scale.
images.billing.bundle_basic_short_descri: Includes 1,000 minutes of video and 100,000 images
images.billing.bundle_basic_description: Store up to 100,000 images and 1,000 minutes of video content. Deliver up to 500,000 images and 5,000 minutes of video content each month.
images.billing.bundle_advanced_short_des: Includes 10,000 minutes of video and 500,000 images
images.billing.bundle_advanced_descripti: Store up to 500,000 images and 10,000 minutes of video content. Deliver up to 1,000,000 images and 50,000 minutes of video content each month.
images.billing.resizing_notice_title: You're currently using the legacy plan for Image Resizing
images.billing.resizing_notice_descripti: Image Resizing is now available as transformations under Cloudflare Images. You can continue to optimize and manipulate images that aren’t stored in Cloudflare Images. When you purchase Images, then you will automatically switch to the new pricing plan, which costs  per 1,000 unique transformations. Each unique transformation is billed only once per 30 day period.
images.billing.single_product_feature_1: Up to 20 variants per image at no extra cost
images.billing.single_product_feature_2: Automatic image optimization in formats including WebP and AVIF
images.billing.bundle_feature_1: All the features of Cloudflare Stream and Cloudflare Images
images.billing.bundle_feature_3: Add extra Image and Video storage capacity as you grow

images.billing.prgExperiment.bundle_page: Cloudflare Images is an end-to-end solution designed to help you streamline your image infrastructure from a single API

Use Cloudflare Images to store, optimize, and deliver your images.
**You have an existing subscription to Cloudflare Stream. You can purchase Starter or Creator bundles only when your Cloudflare Stream subscription is canceled and has ended.**
images.billing.prgExperiment.cloudflare_: Optimize, resize, and deliver media at scale
images.billing.prgExperiment.basic.featu: %{numberOfMinutes} minutes of video delivered per month
images.billing.prgExperiment.advanced.fe: %{numberOfMinutes} minutes of video delivered per month
images.billing.prgExperiment.featureCard: %{price} per %{number} additional unique transformations of images and video
%{price} per %{number} additional minutes of video stored
%{price} per %{number} additional minutes of video delivered
Images: Efficiently store, transform, and deliver images
Stream: Store, encode, and deliver live and on-demand video
Media transformations: Dynamically optimize and transform images and video on-the-fly, regardless of where they are stored
Efficiently store images and videos - no need to upload duplicate versions
Dynamically transform images and videos stored anywhere on the Internet
Seamless, all-in-one live and on-demand video streaming

images.overview_without_subscription.des: Cloudflare Images is an end-to-end solution designed to help you streamline your image infrastructure from a single API.
images.overview_without_subscription.tra: With transformations, you can optimize and manipulate images that are stored in remote sources.
Your account can serve up to  unique transformations every month at no added cost. To use this feature, you must enable transformations on your zone.
images.overview_without_subscription.pur: To make the most of out our storage and delivery features, purchase a [paid Images plan](//images/plans).
images.overview_without_subscription.sto: To make the most of our storage and delivery features, upgrade your Images plan.
A subscription is required to add storage and unlock additional features.

images.delivery_zones_page_description: Enable transformations to optimize and manipulate images that are stored outside of Images. Transformed images are served from one of your zones on Cloudflare.
images.delivery_zones_page_description_n: Enable transformations to optimize and manipulate images and videos that are stored outside of Images and Stream. Transformed media is served from one of your zones on Cloudflare.

images.delivery_zone_confirm_disable_all: Are you sure you want to disable image and video transformations for %{zoneName}?
images.cancel_resizing_after_bundle_erro: You successfully purchased a Cloudflare Images bundle but we were not able to cancel your existing Image Resizing subscription. Your upgrade is incomplete. Please open a support ticket for billing.</br></br><0>Navigate to images</0>
images.no_storage_card.title: Your current Cloudflare Images plan doesn’t include any storage.
images.no_storage_card.description: To take advantage of storage and delivery features, purchase storage for your plan.
images.no_storage_card.storage1: To make the most of our storage and delivery features, purchase storage for your plan.
images.dynamic_transformation_card.descr: Adapt images to your site’s layout and your visitor’s screen sizes by automatically resizing, adjusting quality, and converting to WebP format on demand.
images.dynamic_transformation_card.disab: Transformations let you optimize and manipulate images and videos that are stored outside of Images and Stream. Every transformed variant is cached at the edge, so you store only the original media on your server.
Use the Cloudflare API to configure transformations
images.resize_any_origin_hint: When disabled, Image Resizing only resizes images in the enabled zone and prevents third-parties from resizing any image at any origin
images.upgrade_card.supertitle: Using transformations requires you to update your plan.
images.upgrade_card.title: Explore what’s offered.
images.upgrade_card.blog_post_descriptio: Read our blog post to learn more about what’s new and how transformations differ from Image Resizing.
images.upgrade_card.documentation_descri: Read our documentation to learn more about functionality and how to use transformations.
images.upgrade_card.no_stream_subscripti: Your subscription is in a custom state. Please contact %{supportEmail} to upgrade to the new unified images.
images.upgrade_card.contact_cm_to_update: Updated Images Plan required. Contact your Account Manager to update
images.images_delivered_tooltip: Your count of deliveries for images that are stored in Images, regardless of cache.
images.image_transformations_tooltip: Your count of unique transformations of images that are stored outside of Images.
images.unique_transformations_counter_to: This represents unique requests to transform images and videos that are stored outside of Images and Stream.

images.flexible_variants_settings.title: Flexible variants
images.flexible_variants_settings.enable: Enabling flexible variants on your account effectively allows anyone to obtain untransformed, full-resolution images and their metadata by changing variant properties in the URL.
images.flexible_variants_settings.disabl: Are you sure you want to disable flexible variants? Existing URLs using flexible variants will no longer work after this feature is disabled.
images.flexible_variants_settings.descri: Flexible variants allow you to create variants with dynamic resizing. Once activated, it is possible to use resizing parameters on any Cloudflare Image.
images.payment_form.storage_description: You only pay for the original image. If you have 10 original images with 5 configured variants, only the 10 original images count towards your storage limit.
images.payment_form.delivery_description: You will only be billed for the number of images served.
images.payment_form.transformations_desc: You will be billed only once per 30 days for every unique transformation.</br>- This feature must be activated on each zone
images.payment_form.add_storage_anytime: *You can add storage to your plan at any time

images.plan_cards.images_features_3: Optimize the delivery using modern formats

images.transformations_c2pa_description: Content Credentials create a record to verify the authenticity and origin of media content. When this setting is enabled, C2PA metadata (Content Credentials) will be preserved during optimization and additional transformations will be added to the metadata.
images.provider_rewrite.card.title: Fastly URL Rewrites
images.provider_rewrite.card.description: Migrate from another service without changing your existing URLs. When this rule is active, Cloudflare will map your existing URLs from a supported service to be compatible with Images.
images.provider_rewrite.drawer.title: Configure rules
images.provider_rewrite.drawer.descripti: Rewrite your URLs from an existing service to be compatible with Images
images.provider_rewrite.confirmation.des: Are you sure you want to disable Fastly URL Rewrites?
images.allowed_origins.restrict_transfor: Resize images from specified origins for enhanced security and control, or from any origin for flexibility and wider access to resources.
images.allowed_origins.card_details: Define the domains, subdomains, and paths for transforming remote images and videos on this zone.
images.allowed_origins.radio_any_origin_: Allow source media from any origin. This may allow third parties to transform media using your zone.
images.allowed_origins.radio_domain_deta: Only allow source media from  or *.
images.allowed_origins.radio_allowed_ori: Only allow source media from specified origins. This does not automatically include subdomains.
images.allowed_origins.confirm_unsaved_d: You have unsaved changes. Discarding them will result in losing your progress. Are you sure you want to continue?
images.allowed_origins.confirm_unsaved_s: You have unsaved changes. Discarding them will result in losing your progress. Are you sure you want to leave this page?
images.allowed_origins.confirm_delete_or: Are you sure you want to delete this origin?
Deleting this origin will prevent images and videos from this domain from being transformed on your zone.
images.allowed_origins.confirm_any_origi: Are you sure you want to allow transformations from any origin? This will clear your list of accepted origins and may allow third parties to transform images using your zone.
images.allowed_origins.drawer_descriptio: Allow source media from this origin.

images.flows.query_parameters_descriptio: Use an asterisk (*) character if you want to match any use of this query parameter.
images.flows.extensions_description: Select what file extensions this flow should affect. If none are selected, all files in this path will be affected.
images.flows.paths_description: Use an asterisk (*) character to match many requests on this zone. Use * to match all requests on this zone.
